user.title: Solar Forecast ML
user.description:
Required: Power Sensor, Daily Yield
Optional: All other fields

Weather data is provided automatically via Open-Meteo API (no configuration needed)

data_description.power_entity: Unit: Watts (DC). Only the direct cell output, NOT the AC power after the inverter. (Required)
data_description.solar_yield_today: Unit: kWh (DC). Must be based on the DC power sensor and reset to 0 at midnight. (Required)
data_description.total_consumption_today: Unit: kWh. Total household electricity consumption since midnight. Must reset to 0 at midnight. (Optional)
data_description.solar_capacity: Unit: kWp (e.g. 9.6). Only needed for single systems; with panel groups this is calculated automatically. (Optional)
data_description.inverter_max_power: Unit: kW. Caps forecasts at the inverter maximum (e.g. 5.0). 0 = Disabled. (Optional)
data_description.rain_sensor: Unit: mm/h. Physical outdoor sensor required (weather station). No yes/no values, only measurements! (Optional)
data_description.lux_sensor: Unit: Lux. Physical outdoor sensor required. No indoor sensors, no simulated values! (Optional)
data_description.temp_sensor: Unit: °C. Only real measurement data from a local outdoor sensor. No online weather services! (Optional)
data_description.wind_sensor: Unit: m/s or km/h. Physical anemometer at the installation site required. (Optional)
data_description.humidity_sensor: Unit: % RH. Local outdoor sensor required. Do not use indoor values. (Optional)
data_description.pressure_sensor: Unit: hPa. Requires a physical barometer sensor on site. Used for trend detection. No online data! (Optional)
data_description.solar_radiation_sensor: Unit: W/m². Measured by on-site pyranometer. Takes priority over Lux sensors for highest precision. (Optional)

panel_groups.title: Configure Panel Groups (Required)
panel_groups.description:
⚠️ REQUIRED: At least 1 panel group needed (max. 4)

Format: Power(Wp)/Azimuth(°)/Tilt(°)/Daily-kWh-Sensor

Example south-facing:
5000/180/30/sensor.pv_energy_today

Example east-west:
2500/90/15/sensor.pv_east_today, 2500/270/15/sensor.pv_west_today

Azimuth: 0°=North, 90°=East, 180°=South, 270°=West
Tilt: 0°=horizontal, 90°=vertical

Daily-kWh-Sensor: Required for correct group learning (must reset at midnight)

data_description.panel_groups_input: Format: Power/Azimuth/Tilt/Daily-kWh-Sensor - comma or newline separated

reconfigure_panel_groups.title: Reconfigure Panel Groups (Required)
reconfigure_panel_groups.description:
⚠️ REQUIRED: At least 1 panel group needed (max. 4)

Format: Power(Wp)/Azimuth(°)/Tilt(°)/Daily-kWh-Sensor

Example: 5000/180/30/sensor.pv_energy_today
Or: 2500/90/15/sensor.pv_east, 2500/270/15/sensor.pv_west

Daily-kWh-Sensor: Required for correct group learning

data_description.panel_groups_input: Format: Power/Azimuth/Tilt/Daily-kWh-Sensor - comma or newline separated

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Solar Forecast ML
reconfigure.description:
Update configuration
Empty optional fields will clear their value

Weather data is provided automatically via Open-Meteo API

data_description.power_entity: Unit: Watts (DC). Only the direct cell output, NOT the AC power after the inverter. (Required)
data_description.solar_yield_today: Unit: kWh (DC). Must be based on the DC power sensor and reset to 0 at midnight. (Required)
data_description.total_consumption_today: Unit: kWh. Total household electricity consumption since midnight. Must reset to 0 at midnight. (Optional)
data_description.solar_capacity: Unit: kWp (e.g. 9.6). Only needed for single systems; with panel groups this is calculated automatically. (Optional)
data_description.inverter_max_power: Unit: kW. Caps forecasts at the inverter maximum (e.g. 5.0). 0 = Disabled. (Optional)
data_description.rain_sensor: Unit: mm/h. Physical outdoor sensor required (weather station). No yes/no values, only measurements! (Optional)
data_description.lux_sensor: Unit: Lux. Physical outdoor sensor required. No indoor sensors, no simulated values! (Optional)
data_description.temp_sensor: Unit: °C. Only real measurement data from a local outdoor sensor. No online weather services! (Optional)
data_description.wind_sensor: Unit: m/s or km/h. Physical anemometer at the installation site required. (Optional)
data_description.humidity_sensor: Unit: % RH. Local outdoor sensor required. Do not use indoor values. (Optional)
data_description.pressure_sensor: Unit: hPa. Requires a physical barometer sensor on site. Used for trend detection. No online data! (Optional)
data_description.solar_radiation_sensor: Unit: W/m². Measured by on-site pyranometer. Takes priority over Lux sensors for highest precision. (Optional)

error.panel_groups_required: At least 1 panel group required. Format: Power/Azimuth/Tilt/Sensor (e.g., 5000/180/30/sensor.pv_today)
error.energy_sensor_not_found: Energy sensor not found in Home Assistant. Check the entity ID.
error.energy_sensor_not_numeric: Energy sensor value is not numeric. Check sensor state.

data_description.evcc_forecast: Provides a sensor with hourly forecast data in evcc format. Enables direct integration into evcc without template sensors. Default: OFF
data_description.notify_fog: Show notification when fog is detected
data_description.notify_frost: Show notification when frost is detected
data_description.notify_weather_alert: Show notification on weather alerts (rain, storm)
data_description.notify_snow_covered_panels: Show notification when panels are snow-covered
data_description.ml_algorithm: Choose algorithm: 'Automatic' lets system decide based on available data (recommended). 'Ridge' is fast and stable. 'Neural Network' provides 5-10% better accuracy with 100+ samples.
data_description.enable_tiny_lstm: Allow use of Neural Network (requires 100+ samples, 200+ MB RAM). Falls back to Ridge automatically if requirements not met. Recommended: Keep enabled.
data_description.pirate_weather_api_key: Optional: Free API key from https://pirate-weather.apiable.io/ - Enables NOAA GFS/HRRR weather model for improved cloud cover blending.
data_description.adaptive_forecast_mode: When significant deviations (>35%) between morning forecast and actual production are detected, SFML automatically adjusts the afternoon forecast at 12:30. SFML autonomously decides whether a correction is beneficial - based on fresh weather data and objective criteria. Default: OFF
data_description.winter_mode: Enhanced algorithms for low sun angles (Nov-Feb). When enabled, the effect of cloud cover on forecast is calculated more accurately, significantly improving winter accuracy. Default: ON
data_description.learning_backup_protection: Automatically syncs learning data to /share/ for protection against backup restore. When enabled, your learning progress survives HA backup restores. Default: ON
data_description.zero_export_mode: MPPT THROTTLE DETECTION: Enable if you have a zero-export regulation (e.g. Shelly). This prevents ML from learning incorrect values when your inverter throttles due to no grid export being allowed. When active and production is much lower than expected on sunny days, the hour is excluded from training.
data_description.has_battery: MPPT THROTTLE DETECTION: Enable if you have a battery storage system. When enabled, you must configure the Solar-to-Battery sensor below. This allows detection of throttling when the battery is full.
data_description.solar_to_battery_sensor: MPPT THROTTLE DETECTION: Power sensor showing energy flow from PV to battery (in Watts). When this value drops below 50W during good weather conditions, the system assumes the battery is full and excludes the hour from ML training. Examples: sensor.pv_to_battery_power, sensor.battery_charging_power

model_training_failed.title: ML Model Training Failed
model_training_failed.description:
Training failed: {error}
Check logs for details.

insufficient_data.title: Insufficient Training Data
insufficient_data.description: Need {required} samples, have {current}. Continue collecting data.

weather_api_error.title: Weather API Error
weather_api_error.description:
Weather API unavailable: {error}
Using fallback forecast.
